synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20940 Oracle Linux 9 glib2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20940
description:
[2.68.4-18]
- gdbusconnection: Prevent sending a serial of zero on overflow
- Resolves: RHEL-114059

[2.68.4-17]
- Add patches for CVE-2024-52533 and CVE-2025-4373
- Update GDateTime test for new tzdata
- Resolves: RHEL-94483
- Resolves: RHEL-102844
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20940

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20940.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
glib2-2.68.4-18.el9_7.i686.rpm
glib2-2.68.4-18.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
glib2-devel-2.68.4-18.el9_7.i686.rpm
glib2-devel-2.68.4-18.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
glib2-doc-2.68.4-18.el9_7.noarch.rpm
glib2-static-2.68.4-18.el9_7.i686.rpm
glib2-static-2.68.4-18.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
glib2-tests-2.68.4-18.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
glib2-2.68.4-18.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
glib2-devel-2.68.4-18.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
glib2-doc-2.68.4-18.el9_7.noarch.rpm
glib2-static-2.68.4-18.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
glib2-tests-2.68.4-18.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/glib2-2.68.4-18.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.68.4-18]
- gdbusconnection: Prevent sending a serial of zero on overflow
- Resolves: RHEL-114059

[2.68.4-17]
- Add patches for CVE-2024-52533 and CVE-2025-4373
- Update GDateTime test for new tzdata
- Resolves: RHEL-94483
- Resolves: RHEL-102844
